news.summary: In Centennial, Colorado, Westwater Resources, Inc. shared news of growing interest in its natural graphite anode material, set to be manufactured at the Kellyton Graphite Plant. Following the introduction of global tariffs, the company is witnessing heightened demand for this product. Currently, most of the world's natural graphite anode material is imported from Chinese suppliers. Westwater, traded on NYSE American as WWR, anticipates a surge in production and sales with this strategic development.
news.headline: Increased demand for Westwater Resources' Kellyton graphite plant product due to global tariffs on Chinese imports.

news.summary: Total revenue increased by 16% year-over-year to $1.8 billion, with noninterest expense showing a 1% decrease in the same period. Net interest income also saw a quarter-over-quarter uptick of 4%. Credit metrics improved as nonperforming assets reduced by 9% and net charge-offs decreased by 4% quarter-over-quarter. The common equity tier 1 ratio rose to 11.8%.
news.headline: KeyCorp's Q1 2025 net income is $370M, or $0.33 per share; revenue at $1.8B, up by 16%; expenses down by 1%.

news.summary: A total of 14 abstracts will be presented by Caris Life Sciences, including 2 oral presentations and 12 posters. This announcement was made in Irving, Texas on April 17, 2025. Caris, a prominent next-generation AI TechBio company specializing in precision medicine, declared this information.
news.headline: Caris Life Sciences will present 14 abstracts, including 2 oral presentations and 12 posters at AACR 2025.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Dallas, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) announced a monthly cash distribution for holders of trust units. The distribution will be available to record holders of Trust Units as of April 30, 2025, with payment scheduled for May 14, 2025.
news.headline: PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) declares monthly cash distribution to record holders of Trust Units, payable on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, CGI, a leading global technology and professional services company, disclosed that its CGI Advantage® Enterprise Resource Planning solution has achieved GovRAMP Authorized status. This accreditation signifies a major milestone for CGI, a company listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: GIB.A) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: GIB), and solidifies its position as a key player in the technology industry.
news.headline: CGI's ERP solution, CGI Advantage, becomes first to achieve GovRAMP Authorized status. Stock markets: TSX: GIB.A, NYSE: GIB.

news.summary: The futures of the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a significant decrease as UnitedHealth experienced a sharp decline due to reduced guidance. However, the technology sector saw a boost with positive earnings from Taiwan Semiconductor. Additionally, discussions regarding tariffs by President Trump also influenced the market positively. Investors are now awaiting Netflix's performance. This news showcases the fluctuating market as Dow Jones Futures were impacted by UnitedHealth but lifted by Taiwan Semi's success, all while Netflix's performance remains uncertain.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop due to UnitedHealth crash, offset by Taiwan Semi gains; Netflix update imminent.

news.summary: Sapiens International Corporation, a prominent provider of insurance industry software solutions, is set to disclose its financial performance for the First quarter of 2025. The announcement was made on April 17, 2025, from Rochelle Park, N.J. Sapiens International Corporation, listed on the NASDAQ as SPNS and the TASE as SPNS, is known for its innovative offerings to the global insurance sector. Investors and stakeholders eagerly await the upcoming financial report to gauge the company's standing in the industry.
news.headline: Sapiens will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025; a global insurance software provider.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures saw a rise before the long Easter weekend, with Good Friday on April 18 and Easter Sunday on April 20. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell discussed the potential economic challenges ahead. U.S. export restrictions on Nvidia Corp.'s H20 GPUs impacted markets. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.32% and the two-year bond was at 3.82%. The probability of the Fed maintaining interest rates in May was at 86.4%. In the premarket, Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 futures were up. ETFs tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 rose. The previous day saw significant losses in semiconductors, while energy stocks rose. U.S. retail sales surged by 1.4% in March. Nasdaq Composite, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 indices fell. Full story on Benzinga.com covers analyst insights and market performance details.
news.headline: US stock futures are set to open higher for long weekend, with indices like S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 rising in premarket. Fed's Powell discussed economy goals. Many key ETFs rose. Industrial production fell but retail sales surged in March. Key indices saw declines. Nvidia faced export restrictions on H20 GPUs. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.32%. Market predicts Fed will keep interest rates unchanged in May. Energy stocks performed well. Travelers Companies and Abbott Laboratories reported positive results.

news.summary: Atlanta and Toronto - Euna Solutions®, a top provider of specialized SaaS solutions for the public sector, has unveiled its Call for Speakers for the first Eunaverse 2025 conference. This three-day event is set to occur from September 8 to 10, 2025, at the Hilton Buena Vista Palace in Orlando, Florida. Tom Amburgey expressed, “Eunaverse focuses on shared learning - highlighting successful strategies to advance the public sector collectively.”
news.headline: Euna Solutions calls for speakers for Eunaverse 2025 conference in Orlando on Sept 8-10 to discuss moving public sector forward.
Trump: The Fed should have lowered interest rates long ago.

news.summary: Binance, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, is in discussions with several countries to establish strategic digital asset reserves. Its CEO, Richard Teng, stated that they have been advising governments on setting up Bitcoin reserves and formulating crypto asset regulations. They have received approaches from multiple governments and sovereign wealth funds regarding this matter, with the United States being a frontrunner. The shift towards establishing crypto reserves is fueled by the US's crypto-friendly agenda, with discussions about creating a national Bitcoin reserve. Although countries like Pakistan and Kyrgyzstan are collaborating with Binance on crypto regulations, no concrete plans for crypto reserves have been mentioned. Binance seems to be moving away from its no-formal-headquarters approach and is considering a global headquarters. This shift comes as more jurisdictions adopt clearer frameworks for regulating crypto businesses. Binance was under scrutiny by multiple governments in 2020. The company did not respond to inquiries about its crypto policy collaborations with governments.
news.headline: Binance assists countries with Bitcoin reserves & crypto policies according to CEO, involved in discussions with multiple govts. US leads with new crypto-friendly agenda. Headquarters plans in the works.
Trump: The US is getting rich on tariffs.
Trump: Jerome Powell is always too late and wrong.
Trump: Powell’s termination cannot come fast enough.

news.summary: In Toronto, Rupert Resources Ltd released an exploration update regarding its properties in Central Lapland, Northern Finland. The update includes new drilling results and interpretations from Heinä South, located 1km from the 4Moz Ikkari Project (mentioned in the press release from February 18, 2025). Additionally, findings from other targets along the 12km regional structure east-northeast from Ikkari, referred to as the "Rajala" line, were discussed. Noteworthy highlights from the update include the ongoing discovery of high-grade mineralization at Heinä South.
news.headline: Rupert Resources provides exploration update in Finland, with new drilling results near 4Moz Ikkari Project.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Monte Carlo, a prominent data + AI observability platform, has introduced observability agents to enhance monitoring and troubleshooting processes for improved data + AI reliability. The platform's Monitoring Agent suggests data quality monitoring rules and thresholds, facilitating easy deployment upon approval. Conversely, the Troubleshooting Agent delves into identifying, confirming, and clarifying the underlying issues causing data quality discrepancies. These agents aim to streamline workflows and ensure more efficient data + AI operations.
news.headline: Monte Carlo launches observability agents for data + AI monitoring and troubleshooting. Monitoring Agent recommends rules and thresholds, Troubleshooting Agent investigates root causes.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Visa has revealed that its Product Drop event is set to take place on April 30. This event will feature Visa CEO Ryan McInerney and Visa Chief Product and Strategy Officer Jack Forestell, who will introduce innovative products, solutions, and technology partners shaping the future of commerce. Forestell emphasized the company's commitment to transforming consumer-card interactions with the introduction of a range of new solutions in the previous year. The stage is set for a significant unveiling of advancements in the upcoming event.
news.headline: Visa's Product Drop event on April 30 in SF with CEO and CPO presenting new products & solutions. Last year unveiled new solutions for consumers.

news.summary: Marketing Architects, in partnership with Misfits & Machines, have developed innovative AI tools for TV creative production without the need for shooting. The technology enables faster and more scalable production processes.
news.headline: Marketing Architects and Misfits & Machines partner to create AI-powered TV creative production tools, revolutionizing the industry with speed and scalability.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Exaforce revealed securing $75 million in Series A funding. Notable investors Khosla Ventures, Mayfield, and Thomvest Ventures led the funding round. The company aims to progress its Agentic SOC Platform, integrating AI agents referred to as “Exabots” and advanced data exploration. This platform is designed to decrease human-led SOC work by tenfold for enterprises, enhancing security outcomes significantly. Established by tech veterans with a track record of success and profound knowledge in AI and cybersecurity from various notable companies.
news.headline: Exaforce secures $75M in Series A funding for AI-driven security platform, aiming to reduce SOC work 10x.

news.summary: In Toronto, Vena, a leading AI-enabled FP&A platform, has started FY26 on a high note after a successful end to FY25. This past year saw significant growth, notable customer acquisitions, industry recognition, and continuous product enhancements. The company's recent entry into the Microsoft Azure Marketplace further solidifies its position within the Microsoft technology ecosystem. Vena's achievements include being recognized as the top agentic AI-powered platform and paving the way for continued success in the upcoming fiscal year.
news.headline: Vena starts FY26 strong with record growth and industry recognition. Entered Microsoft Azure Marketplace for scalability.
Details on criteria for Riksbank auctions of gov't bonds disclosed, essential for investors.  #Riksbank #auctions #bonds

news.summary: Chagee Holdings Limited, a prominent brand offering healthy and delightful freshly-made tea drinks, has revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering on April 17, 2025. The Company priced 14,683,991 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at US$28.00 per ADS, before underwriting discounts and commissions. Each ADS signifies one Class A ordinary share of Chagee. The anticipated gross proceeds from the Offering, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions along with other offering expenses, are approximately US$411.2 million. Furthermore, Chagee has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an additional 2,202,598 ADSs at the initial public offering price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions, to address over-allotments.
news.headline: Chagee Holdings Limited prices IPO at $28 per ADS, selling 14,683,991 ADSs for approx. $411.2 million, with option for 2,202,598 more ADSs.

news.summary: A leading non-bank lender, Carrington Mortgage Services, LLC (CMS), based in Anaheim, California, offers a wide range of loan options and services to consumers, investors, mortgage brokers, and bankers across the country. With a focus on growth, the company's leadership has tasked the CMS Mortgage Lending team with enhancing efficiency and scalability through the use of automation and technology. This initiative aims to streamline the loan origination process and improve operations as CMS expands its reach.
news.headline: Carrington Mortgage Services wins Excellence in Origination Innovation Award from ICE Mortgage Technology for leveraging automation.
United Health Group Q1 2025 Earnings

news.summary: According to recent data, approximately 50% of cyberattacks led to the theft of data or credentials. The primary method of entry for these attacks was identity abuse. In 2024, the Asia Pacific region experienced over 33% of all cyberattacks, signifying a significant portion of the total incidents. This information was disclosed by IBM in their latest report on cybersecurity threats.
news.headline: 2025 IBM X-Force Threat Index shows large-scale credential theft increasing, with nearly half of cyberattacks resulting in stolen data or credentials. Asia Pacific accounts for over one-third of attacks in 2024.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on April 17, 2025, Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) has scheduled its Q1 2025 earnings conference call for Thursday, May 1, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Interested parties can join the call by dialing in at the provided number. Additionally, the live audio webcast of the earnings presentation will be available for access.
news.headline: Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) to hold Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Dial-in details provided.

news.summary: In Fremont, California, on April 17, 2025, Socket Mobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCKT), a prominent company offering data capture solutions for increased productivity, shared plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 at the market's closure on Thursday.
news.headline: Socket Mobile (NASDAQ: SCKT) to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 17th; a leading data solutions provider.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, a tech-focused platform called Book an Author was selected to join the 2025 Gold House Ventures Founder Fellowship program in collaboration with the New York City Economic department. This marketplace streamlines author searches, event reservations, participation in book fairs, and bulk purchases. The program offers valuable opportunities to startups and includes mentorship, networking, and funding support.
news.headline: Book an Author selected for Gold House Ventures Founder Fellowship in NYC, revolutionizing storytelling access. Tech marketplace streamlines author discovery, event booking, bulk sales.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, two nonprofit organizations, GMO/Toxin Free USA and Organic Consumers Association, initiated legal action against Perfect Day, Inc. The lawsuit accuses the company of misleading marketing tactics and withholding vital information about its genetically modified synthetic dairy item, ProFerm. The product in question, ProFerm, has raised concerns due to alleged material omissions and deceptive practices.
news.headline: Nonprofits sue Perfect Day for deceptive marketing of ProFerm dairy product, alleging material omissions; filed in Washington.

news.summary: In MIDDLETOWN, Delaware on April 17, 2025, Earendil Labs, a prominent player in AI-centered research and development of advanced biologics therapeutics, partnered with Sanofi. This collaboration involves a license agreement for two innovative bispecific treatments, marking a significant step forward in the pharmaceutical industry.
news.headline: Earendil Labs partners with Sanofi for exclusive license of next-gen bispecific antibodies for AI & IBD.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on April 17, 2025, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Interested investors can join the live earnings call for this quarter at 8 a.m. ET today through a webcast or by dialing in. The webcast link is available at app.webinar.net/KNd8VGQjew3.
news.headline: Truist Financial Corporation reported first quarter 2025 results today. Investors can join live earnings call at 8 a.m. ET.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, is launching an Easter rewards program for Bybit Card users. Users participating in eligible transactions have the opportunity to win up to 5 guaranteed prizes, with a chance to receive...
news.headline: Bybit Card's Easter treasure hunt offers 24K gold rewards to users with up to 5 guaranteed prizes per transaction.

news.summary: In Victoria, the Seychelles, on April 17, 2025, MEXC Ventures, the investment branch of the prominent cryptocurrency exchange MEXC, disclosed plans to allocate $30 million. This funding aims to bolster Web3 talent and drive advancements within the decentralized ecosystem.
news.headline: MEXC Ventures announces $30 million initiative, IgniteX, to support Web3 talent and innovation.

news.summary: Zymeworks Inc., a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as ZYME, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed that they will unveil their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8, 2025, after market close. The company focuses on creating innovative biotherapeutics for challenging illnesses such as cancer, inflammation, and autoimmune diseases. Subsequently, on the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time, Zymeworks management will conduct a conference call and webcast to elaborate on the financial outcomes and offer an update on the company's operations.
news.headline: Zymeworks (Nasdaq: ZYME) will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 pm Eastern Time.

news.summary: In the initial quarter of 2025, the net income reached $47.0 million with a portion of $42.7 million available to common stockholders, equivalent to $0.92 per diluted share.
news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. reports Q1 2025 net income of $47M and net income available to common stockholders of $42.7M.
Ligand's subsidiary Pelthos Therapeutics is set to merge with Channel Therapeutics.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Vancouver, BC, Precore Gold Corp. (CSE: PRCG) welcomed Mr. Louis Gariepy, P. Eng (OIQ), to its Advisory Board as the Lead Technical Advisor. With a remarkable 30-year background in global mining, Mr. Gariepy, a geological engineer, brings significant expertise from his work in Québec and Latin America.
news.headline: Precore Gold Corp appoints Louis Gariepy to its Advisory Board as Lead Technical Advisor with 30 years mining experience.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, GRAVITY Co., Ltd., a leading developer and publisher of online and mobile games listed on NasdaqGM as GRVY, unveiled the release of Ragnarok: Back to Glory in South Korea and Southeast Asia. news.headline: Verano expands to 81 dispensaries in Florida, celebrates 420 with deals at MÜV locations statewide.

news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin, on April 17, 2025, J OHNSON O UTDOORS I NC. (Nasdaq: JOUT), a key player in outdoor recreation equipment and technology globally, is set to announce its financial results for the Fiscal 2025 second quarter on May 2, 2025, before the market opens. Following the release, a conference call and audio webcast will be held at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes and deliver a business update.
news.headline: Johnson Outdoors (Nasdaq: JOUT) to release Fiscal 2025 Q2 results on May 2, 2025, with conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Martinsville, Virginia, on April 17, 2025, Hooker Furnishings Corporation, trading under NASDAQ-GS: HOFT, shared its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on February 2, 2025. With a history spanning 101 years, the Company is recognized globally for its home furnishing design, production, and marketing. The fiscal 2025 fourth quarter lasted 14 weeks, while the full year consisted of 53 weeks, compared to 13 weeks and 52 weeks in the previous year, respectively.
news.headline: Hooker Furnishings saw improved sales in Q4, fiscal year ended Feb 2, 2025, with 14-week Q4 and 53-week FY, in contrast to 13 and 52 last year.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) unveiled a five-point action plan to safeguard stockholder value and combat false information regarding the company and possible illicit short selling. Rumors surfaced post the filing of Form D, with claims of executive stock sales and an imminent reverse stock split triggering immediate speculation. The company aims to address these by implementing strategic measures to uphold stock value and address misinformation.
news.headline: Faraday Future opposes reverse stock split, aims to maintain Nasdaq listing. Introduces 5-point plan to protect stock value.

news.summary: In Cape Town, South Africa, on April 17, 2025, ATFX reaffirmed its ongoing commitment to The Duke of Edinburgh Cup by hosting the inaugural 2025 tournament at Steyn City in Johannesburg. Bringing together golf aficionados from around the world, the event was a resounding success, showcasing the sport's universal appeal and fostering camaraderie among participants.
news.headline: ATFX celebrates 8 years of backing Duke of Edinburgh Cup in 2025 at Steyn City, Johannesburg, South Africa.
Marex Group plc sets the price for public offering.

news.summary: Bitcoin is predicted to reach a new all-time high of $155,000, inspired by gold's performance. Bitcoin is currently down 9.3% year-to-date, while gold continues to hit record highs. Despite the disparity, both assets are seen as remarkably impressive during the current macroeconomic storm. Bitcoin bulls hope for a breakout to reclaim six figures and beyond. Analysts highlight potential tailwinds for Bitcoin, including a declining US dollar index and high global money supply. Gold and Bitcoin are increasingly seen as global neutral reserve assets. Bitcoin's historical drawdown remains relatively modest at around 30%, showcasing resilience during unfavorable conditions. Bitcoin's performance is compared to past macroeconomic events, showing robustness in modern investor sentiment towards the asset. The article emphasizes that every investment involves risk and readers should conduct their own research before making decisions.
news.headline: BTC targets $155K in copycat move inspired by gold's record-breaking trend. BTC down 9.3% YTD vs. gold breaks ATH. Bullish signals from declining USD, all-time M2 supply highs fuel Bitcoin's impressive performance amid trade war. BTC and gold emerge as global neutral reserve assets. BTC drawdown modest at 30% vs. historical -50% sell-offs. Beware risks in investment moves.

news.summary: UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” has released its audited annual consolidated and separate financial statements for 2024, along with the annual reports of the Company and the Group for the same year.
news.headline: UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" releases audited financial statements for 2024.

news.summary: In the fourth quarter, Israel Englander's Millennium Management disclosed in a February 14 13F-HR filing that it purchased Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded funds. The $75 billion hedge fund invested in the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF and the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF, but these holdings have since faced significant declines. Specifically, the firm's 768,911 units of the Bitcoin ETF decreased from $43.11 to $37.38 per unit, leading to a value drop. The current status of these investments is detailed in a report on a financial news website.
news.headline: Millennium Management's Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs dropped $22.7 million in Q4, with investments declining significantly in value.
